title: Resignation
content:
Petals that fall into a woodland pool
    are servers at a banquet.
    Each one dresses for the occasion
    like an employee with regrets,
    that leaves the house in a somber mood
    the morning after his resignation.
meaning:
Paul Cameron Brown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Resignation"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
